reviews.review_title: Wtf is this? Learn to kitesurf WRONG
reviews.review_description: The physics do not match up with actual kitesurfing at all. That sucks, because this actually has lots of potential. But wtf man? Did you not actually go kitesurfing before creating the app??

developer_response.body:
Hi alexbz62,
Thank you for your feedback. Yes, there is a "shortcut" in the physics, but it is still the first version which has the kite control in focus. There are ideas already to improve exactly the physics in the next version.

You can in addition check the Terms of Services (https://meltingamevr.eu/termsofservice.html) which states "Do not use the Melting Kitesurfing App to learn kitesurfing as you can learn wrong movements."

Best,
Melting

reviews.review_title: I woud do a 0 if i can
reviews.review_description: Its so bad you can't do anything its just water nothing more

developer_response.body:
Hi Ivov80, It is not intended to be a game that much but more a simulator. Nevertheless thank you for you feedback, I will try to add some entertainment elements in the next version.
Best,
Melting

reviews.review_description:
I wish I could understand how to control.
There is no tutorial and I am not even sure what to do.
Maybe it would be nice to have an easy mode (aka the game either tell you what to do, or help you control the kite) and realistic mode...

developer_response.body:
Dear yes4me,

Thank you for the feedback! New version just got released and contains training mode with an audio guide.
When you start the app there is a visual guide on the controllers. You can check the youtube videos "melting kite" channel to see it in action. 

Best regards,
Melting Kite

reviews.review_description:
The App it's on the start of the development, with a lot of improvements to do, but it's already extremely good.

I'm using the app to start learning kite before going to the real water....

Very happy.

( P.s. to start click in B+Y at the same time.)

developer_response.body:
Dear RuiPGO,

Thank you for the feedback!
Yes, Kitesurfing VR is in early stage of development.
Kite control is the key to success, enjoy improving your skills!
Check the visual guide on the controllers when you start the app. To start moving press only the Y button. The A and B buttons were experimental.
The latest version has training mode and audio guide.
Stay tuned for updates!

Best regards,
Melting Kite
